parents.subject: LU-19179 compat: remove RHEL7 dcache handling

commit.subject: LU-19159 lnet: Handle ip2nets in jt_import
commit.message:
LU-19159 lnet: Handle ip2nets in jt_import

jt_import() is updated to understand ip2nets yaml sequence.

Note that not all tunables and lnd tunables are supported because
yaml_lnet_config_ni does not understand all of them. This will be
fixed in a separate patch.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I2bf41e5f97714c66e43172e758a36f91311ec88c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60035
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
